rationale: Review 2 identifies two concrete, diff-grounded API-design gaps — the missing `fiberHomeomorph_inv` lemma (leaving the group homomorphism API asymmetrically incomplete) and the absence of `@[simp]` on `fiberHomeomorph_mul`/`fiberHomeomorph_one` despite simp being applied to the parallel apply/smul lemmas — both verifiable directly in the diff. Review 1's suggested fix (privatizing public definitions) is speculative about roadmap scope and would worsen the API if these definitions are legitimately needed.
